name: azure-agentic-infraops
description: Agentic InfraOps - Azure infrastructure engineered by agents. Verified. Well-Architected. Deployable.

scripts.lint:links:docs: if [ -d docs ]; then find docs -name '*.md' | xargs -I {} markdown-link-check {} --config .markdown-link-check.json; else echo 'ℹ️  docs/ not found - skipping docs link check'; fi
scripts.lint:cost-estimate-templates: echo '⚠️  Merged into lint:artifact-templates' && npm run lint:artifact-templates
scripts.lint:artifact-templates: if [ -f scripts/validate-artifact-templates.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-artifact-templates.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-artifact-templates.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:h2-sync: if [ -f scripts/validate-h2-sync.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-h2-sync.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-h2-sync.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.fix:artifact-h2: if [ -f scripts/fix-artifact-h2.mjs ]; then node scripts/fix-artifact-h2.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/fix-artifact-h2.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:version-sync: if [ -f scripts/validate-version-sync.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-version-sync.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-version-sync.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:deprecated-refs: if [ -f scripts/validate-no-deprecated-refs.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-no-deprecated-refs.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-no-deprecated-refs.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:mcp-config: if [ -f scripts/validate-mcp-config.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-mcp-config.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-mcp-config.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:docs-freshness: if [ -f scripts/check-docs-freshness.mjs ]; then node scripts/check-docs-freshness.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/check-docs-freshness.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:agent-frontmatter: if [ -f scripts/validate-agent-frontmatter.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-agent-frontmatter.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-agent-frontmatter.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:skills-format: if [ -f scripts/validate-skills-format.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-skills-format.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-skills-format.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:instruction-frontmatter: if [ -f scripts/validate-instruction-frontmatter.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-instruction-frontmatter.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-instruction-frontmatter.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.lint:prose: vale --config .vale.ini docs/ .github/ README.md || echo 'Vale not installed - run: brew install vale'
scripts.lint:json: find . -name '*.json' ! -path './node_modules/*' ! -path './infra/*' ! -path './.devcontainer/*' ! -path './.vscode/*' ! -path './scripts/workflow-generator/node_modules/*' -exec sh -c 'node -e "JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"{}\")); console.log(\"✓ {}\")" 2>&1 || echo "✗ {} - Invalid JSON"' \;
scripts.lint:yaml: find . \( -name '*.yml' -o -name '*.yaml' \) ! -path './node_modules/*' ! -path './infra/*' -exec yamllint -c .yamllint.yml {} \; 2>/dev/null || echo 'yamllint not installed - run: pip install yamllint'
scripts.lint:python: cd mcp/azure-pricing-mcp && (python -m ruff --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && python -m ruff check src/ tests/ || echo 'ℹ️  ruff not installed - skipping python lint')
scripts.lint:python:fix: cd mcp/azure-pricing-mcp && (python -m ruff --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && python -m ruff check --fix src/ tests/ || echo 'ℹ️  ruff not installed - skipping python lint fix')
scripts.validate:vscode: if [ -f scripts/validate-vscode-config.mjs ]; then node scripts/validate-vscode-config.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/validate-vscode-config.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.validate:agents: npm run lint:agent-frontmatter && npm run lint:skills-format
scripts.test:1109: npm run validate:vscode && npm run validate:agents && echo '✅ VS Code 1.109 validation passed'
scripts.fetch:deprecations: if [ -f scripts/fetch-azure-deprecations.mjs ]; then node scripts/fetch-azure-deprecations.mjs; else echo 'ℹ️  scripts/fetch-azure-deprecations.mjs not found - skipping'; fi
scripts.validate:all: npm run lint:md && npm run lint:links:docs && npm run lint:artifact-templates && npm run lint:h2-sync && npm run lint:version-sync && npm run lint:deprecated-refs && npm run lint:mcp-config && npm run lint:agent-frontmatter && npm run lint:skills-format && npm run lint:instruction-frontmatter && npm run lint:json && npm run lint:python && echo '✅ All validations passed'

author: Jonathan Vella
